verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I was a beggar when I found this goldmine I was a stranger within, without a song, But now I can sing I'm a child of a King Just wait till you see my new home

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Cause I’m as wealthy as a King in a palace I have riches that’s never been told, With Jesus I’m an heir so I’m a millionaire For I feel like my pockets Are full of diamonds and gold.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I guess I’ll never have a lot of money But I’m so rich with Him in my soul Yes I’d rather have His peace if it means all the tears For I feel like my pockets are full of diamonds and gold.
